metadata.name: KORE: Related Entities Dataset
metadata.authors: J Hoffart, S Seufert, DB Nguyen, M Theobald, G Weikum

papers.title: KORE: Keyphrase Overlap Relatedness for Entity Disambiguation

metadata.description: We selected 20 seed entities from 4 domains (IT companies, Hollywood celebrities, video games, television series). For each of these entities, we selected 20 entities linked from their Wikipedia article, ranked by human annotators on mechanical turk.
